_comment: Lakeflow Declarative Pipeline spec for Marathos. Create with `databricks pipelines create --json @marathos_pipeline.json` (paths below are absolute workspace paths - adjust the user folder if different), or in the UI: Lakeflow Pipelines > Create, set the root to marathos_event and add transformations/. All tables use fully-qualified marathos.<schema>.<table> names.
name: marathos_pipeline_dennis
